caption: Two men sit side-by-side in a room, watching a video on a screen. Both men wear grey t-shirts; the man on the left has short grey hair, while the man on the right has reddish-brown hair and rests his chin on his hand. Behind them, a television displays the text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS" in glowing orange letters, and a shelf filled with CDs is visible. A smaller video window is overlaid on the center of the screen. This inset video changes over time, showing various scenes: first, a group of people in dark clothing gathered in a dim room; then, a wide shot of a blue-domed building; next, a close-up of a woman's face; and finally, a shot of an object exploding. Across the bottom of this inset window, the caption "Where will you go if you surrender Samarkand to Shahruk Khan?" remains constant throughout the sequence.
